elements.text: Chapter 6303: Assessment and Payment of Fees
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 6303.1: Assessment of fees (05/06/26)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assessment of fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Fee for Purchase Contracts that exceed the Maximum Annual Mortgage Purchase Amount
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Refunds, repayments, credits and adjustments
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Recapture of premiums and reimbursement of buyup proceeds
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Assessment of fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: In connection with the delivery of certain Mortgages, the following arrangements are
elements.label: text

elements.text: established regarding fees:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller may be required to pay Freddie Mac Credit Fees and/or other types of fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: (including buydown fees, as defined in Section 6201.2(c)(i)), or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac may be required to pay the Seller proceeds (such as buyup proceeds) or
elements.label: text

elements.text: apply a credit for a Credit Fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: The fees and proceeds will be calculated, assessed and paid, and credits for Credit Fees will
elements.label: text

elements.text: be applied, as described in this chapter.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Credit Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller must refer to Exhibit 19, Credit Fees, for information on Credit Fees. Credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Fees are paid in accordance with the Credit Fee provisions stated in Section 6303.2(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Assessment of Credit Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fees will be assessed and billed to the Seller in conjunction with the sale of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages with certain loan attributes.
elements.label: text

elements.text: A particular Mortgage may be subject to more than one Credit Fee. Unless stated
elements.label: text

elements.text: otherwise in the Seller’s Purchase Documents, Credit Fees applicable to a Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: are cumulative.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Calculation of Credit Fees in Price
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fees in Price are calculated by multiplying the Credit Fee in Price rate(s) by
elements.label: text

elements.text: the UPB of the Mortgage on the Funding/Settlement Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (C) Base Grid Credit Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: For all Mortgages with certain Base Grid combinations, Credit Fees will be assessed
elements.label: text

elements.text: and billed to the Seller as follows:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Unless the Mortgage is sold through Cash-Released XChange®, for Base Grid
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fees applicable to Loan Product Advisor® Mortgages, the applicable Credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Fee will be based on the loan-to-value (LTV) ratio calculated by Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: based on data delivered by the Seller and the Indicator Score found on the Last
elements.label: text

elements.text: Feedback Certificate.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: If the Seller does not deliver the Key Number for a Loan Product Advisor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage, that Mortgage will be assessed the below 620 Base Grid fee.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For Mortgages sold through Cash-Released XChange, the Seller must deliver
elements.label: text

elements.text: ULDD Data Point Loan Level Credit Score Value regardless of whether the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage is a Loan Product Advisor Mortgage, and the Mortgage will be assessed
elements.label: text

elements.text: Base Grid Credit Fees based on ULDD Data Point Loan Level Credit Score Value
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For Non-Loan Product Advisor Mortgages, Base Grid Credit Fees are assessed
elements.label: text

elements.text: based on the Indicator Score delivered to Freddie Mac and the LTV ratio
elements.label: text

elements.text: calculated by Freddie Mac in conjunction with the sale of Mortgages. Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac’s LTV ratio calculation is based on data delivered by the Seller.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: If the Seller does not deliver the Indicator Score for Non-Loan Product
elements.label: text

elements.text: Advisor Mortgages, the Mortgages will be assessed the below 620 Base Grid fee.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (D)Notification of changes to Credit Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon prior written notice to the Seller, Freddie Mac reserves the right to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Change an existing Credit Fee rate (including a credit for a Credit Fee)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Change the process used to determine whether a Mortgage is subject to a Credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Fee or eligible for a credit for a Credit Fee, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Implement a Credit Fee or credit for a Credit Fee on any Mortgage Product and/or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage attribute that is not subject to a Credit Fee or eligible for a credit for a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Payment of buyup proceeds and buydown fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: All buyup proceeds and buydown fees will be determined in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: provisions of Section 6201.2(c)(iv), as applicable.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fees applicable to the Mortgage will be either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Deducted from the amount of any buyup proceeds applicable to the Mortgage, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Added to the amount of any buydown fees applicable to the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii) Gold Rush® fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Guarantor or MultiLender Swap Contracts, Gold Rush fees will be determined in
elements.label: text

elements.text: accordance with the following sections:
elements.label: text

elements.text: Gold Rush fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contract Guide section
elements.label: text

elements.text: Fixed-Rate Guarantor Contracts Section 6203.2(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: WAC ARM Guarantor Contracts Section 6204.2(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: MultiLender Swap Contracts Section 6205.2(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iv)Monthly invoice and account activity statement
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sellers may contact SellerBilling@FreddieMac.com with questions about their monthly
elements.label: text

elements.text: invoice and account activity statement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The following information outlines the process of monthly invoicing and account
elements.label: text

elements.text: statements for Sellers engaging with Freddie Mac under various Mortgage contract
elements.label: text

elements.text: programs.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Monthly invoice
elements.label: text

elements.text: (I) Mortgages sold under cash Purchase Contracts
elements.label: text

elements.text: For all Mortgages sold to Freddie Mac under cash Purchase Contracts under the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cash program, Freddie Mac will net the amount of Credit Fees and credits for
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fees against the amount paid to the Seller.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additionally, all other fees applicable to Mortgages sold under the Cash program
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e.g., pairoff fees and any premium recapture described in Section 6303.1(d)) will
elements.label: text

elements.text: be assessed on the Seller’s monthly invoice.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (II)Mortgages sold under Guarantor and MultiLender Swap Contracts
elements.label: text

elements.text: The net amount of initial Credit Fees, buyup proceeds, buydown fees and
elements.label: text

elements.text: settlement interest applicable to Mortgages sold to Freddie Mac under Guarantor
elements.label: text

elements.text: and MultiLender Swap Contracts will be drafted from the Automated Clearing
elements.label: text

elements.text: House (ACH) account that the Seller has designated for payment of fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: associated with the sale of Mortgages to Freddie Mac in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: provisions of the daily ACH process described in Section 6303.2(a)(i).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The net amount of all other monthly billed fees associated with the sale of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages to Freddie Mac under the Guarantor and MultiLender Swap programs
elements.label: text

elements.text: (such as pairoff fees, any adjustments to a Credit Fee applicable to Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: sold under the Guarantor and MultiLender Swap programs and any early payoff
elements.label: text

elements.text: proceeds described in Section 6303.1(d)) will be assessed on the Seller’s monthly
elements.label: text

elements.text: invoice and drafted from the Seller’s ACH account monthly in accordance with
elements.label: text

elements.text: the provisions of the monthly ACH process described in this Chapter 6303.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Account activity statement
elements.label: text

elements.text: Included with the monthly invoice is a statement reflecting all open account activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: and the total amount due on the Seller’s account for the most recent calendar month.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The statement will include late fees as described in Section 6303.2(b) for accounts
elements.label: text

elements.text: past due and any account adjustments or credits received for previous months’
elements.label: text

elements.text: activities.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Fee for Purchase Contracts that exceed the Maximum Annual Mortgage Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Amount
elements.label: text

elements.text: If Freddie Mac has established a Maximum Annual Mortgage Purchase Amount with respect
elements.label: text

elements.text: to the Seller, Freddie Mac may charge a reasonable fee based on the entire amount of any
elements.label: text

elements.text: Purchase Contract that is rescinded pursuant to Section 1201.4(b).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will determine the amount of the fee at the time the fee is assessed. The Seller
elements.label: text

elements.text: must remit to Freddie Mac the full amount of the fee in the same manner as the payment of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Credit Fees set forth in Section 6303.2(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Refunds, repayments, credits and adjustments
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Refunding Credit Fees and repayment of credits for Credit Fees in connection with
elements.label: text

elements.text: repurchases
elements.label: text

elements.text: During the first 12 months after the funding/settlement of a Mortgage, Freddie Mac may
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide to the Seller a refund for all or a portion of the Credit Fees associated with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage if:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac considers the Mortgage ineligible for purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller is obligated to repurchase the Mortgage from Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller voluntarily requests and receives approval to repurchase the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: from Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Mortgages deemed ineligible or those requiring repurchase, the Seller must reimburse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac for any credits for Credit Fees that were applied to the Seller’s monthly
elements.label: text

elements.text: invoice or purchase price under the Cash program.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: For any refunded Credit Fee, Freddie Mac may apply a processing fee, of 0.5% of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgage’s UPB on the Funding/Settlement Date; in no event will the processing fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: exceed the refund amount.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Recalculating Credit Fees, credits for Credit Fees and proceeds
elements.label: text

elements.text: If, within the first six months following the funding/settlement month, either Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: or the Seller identifies inaccurate delivery data that affects the Credit Fee calculation or
elements.label: text

elements.text: funding fee calculation for the Mortgage, Freddie Mac will use the corrected data to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Recalculate the Credit Fee or funding fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Adjust the credit for the Credit Fee or the proceeds received by Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Depending on the recalculated amounts, the Seller may incur additional fees, receive a
elements.label: text

elements.text: refund, gain credit or be required to repay previous amounts. The adjustments will appear
elements.label: text

elements.text: on a subsequent monthly invoice.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Any other recalculations regarding Credit Fees, funding fees, credits or proceeds will be
elements.label: text

elements.text: at Freddie Mac’s discretion.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Recapture of premiums and reimbursement of buyup proceeds
elements.label: text

elements.text: For any Mortgage that is paid off (whether because of a refinance, a prepay or any other
elements.label: text

elements.text: reason) within 120 days of the Freddie Mac Funding Date or Settlement Date, Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: may, in its sole discretion, require the Seller/Servicer to reimburse Freddie Mac for:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ With respect to a Mortgage delivery through the Cash program: Any premium paid for
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgage (defined as the amount by which the purchase price exceeded the par price,
elements.label: text

elements.text: after netting out the delivery fees) plus a processing fee not to exceed 50 basis points
elements.label: text

elements.text: multiplied by the outstanding UPB of the Mortgage on the Funding Date (this amount is
elements.label: text

elements.text: referred to as the Premium Recapture Fee), and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ With respect to a Mortgage delivery through the Guarantor or MultiLender Swap
elements.label: text

elements.text: program:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ An amount equal to 100 basis points (1%) of the outstanding UPB of the Mortgage,
elements.label: text

elements.text: on the Funding Date (this amount is referred to as the Early Payoff Fee), and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Any buyup proceeds paid by Freddie Mac to the Seller in connection with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivery of the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: The amount of these premiums, fees and buyup proceeds will be reported on the Seller
elements.label: text

elements.text: account activity statement and drafted from the Seller’s ACH account, as described in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6303.2(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6303.2: Payment of fees (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Payment of fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Late payment policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Payment of fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section outlines the procedures and requirements for managing the Automated Clearing
elements.label: text

elements.text: House (ACH) payments and drafts between Freddie Mac and Sellers concerning Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: transactions. It details both daily and monthly ACH processes, associated fees, the process
elements.label: text

elements.text: for establishing ACH payments and policies in case of insufficient funds.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Daily ACH process
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will remit to or draft from the Seller’s designated ACH account the net
elements.label: text

elements.text: amount of the fees applicable to Mortgages sold under the Guarantor and MultiLender
elements.label: text

elements.text: Swap programs on the fifth Business Day after each applicable Settlement Date. The
elements.label: text

elements.text: following fees will be included:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Initial Credit Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Buyup proceeds and buydown fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Buyup and buydown adjustments
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Gold Rush® fees and adjustments
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Guarantor settlement interest
elements.label: text

elements.text: Adjustments and reversals to such fees will be made using the monthly ACH process or
elements.label: text

elements.text: as per instructions provided by Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Seller is due a credit, Freddie Mac will deposit the credit amount to the designated
elements.label: text

elements.text: ACH account within five Business Days of the Settlement Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will provide the Seller with a courtesy e-mail notice to the address specified
elements.label: text

elements.text: by the Seller approximately two Business Days before the ACH draft. The Seller is
elements.label: text

elements.text: responsible for ensuring that the ACH account maintains sufficient funds.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac recommends that Seller designate one or more organization members as
elements.label: text

elements.text: courtesy e-mail recipients. To designate, add, modify or delete a recipient, Sellers must
elements.label: text

elements.text: send a written request to SellerBilling@FreddieMac.com. The request must include the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer number with contact information (name, e-mail and phone number).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Monthly ACH process
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will draft the net amount of all other fees associated with the sale of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages to Freddie Mac, such as pairoff fees; any adjustments to Credit Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable to Mortgages sold under the Cash, Guarantor and MultiLender Swap
elements.label: text

elements.text: programs; and associated training fees from the Seller’s ACH account monthly in
elements.label: text

elements.text: accordance with this Section 6303.2(a)(ii).
elements.label: text

elements.text: In the alternative, if the Seller is due a credit, Freddie Mac will deposit the credit amount
elements.label: text

elements.text: to the designated ACH account on the last Business Day of the month. If the monthly
elements.label: text

elements.text: statement indicates a net amount due to Freddie Mac, Freddie Mac will draft the payment
elements.label: text

elements.text: from the Seller’s ACH account on the last Business Day of the month. The Seller’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: monthly account activity statement will reflect all ACH transactions completed during the
elements.label: text

elements.text: statement period.
elements.label: text

elements.text: To establish ACH payment, the Seller must complete, execute and submit to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Form 1132, Authorization for Automatic Transfer of Funds Through the Automated
elements.label: text

elements.text: Clearing House (ACH) for Seller/Servicers, as an Electronic Record (as defined in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1401.1(b)) using a Portable Document Format (PDF) (or other Electronic Record
elements.label: text

elements.text: format commonly used in the mortgage industry) that has been completed and contains
elements.label: text

elements.text: the copy or representation of the pen and ink signature of the Authorized Employee (such
elements.label: text

elements.text: copy or representation of the Authorized Employee’s signature shall be such Authorized
elements.label: text

elements.text: Employee’s adopted Electronic Signature as defined in Section 1401.1(b)) and either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Attach to an e-mail and deliver to Freddie Mac at
elements.label: text

elements.text: CashCollections@FreddieMac.com; or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Upload through the Freddie Mac eBill system.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac and the Seller agree that the delivery of Electronic Records with Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Signatures are eligible Electronic Transactions (as defined in Section 1401.1(b)) and are
elements.label: text

elements.text: governed by the applicable provisions of Chapter 1401.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The employee authorized to execute Form 1132 on the Seller’s behalf must be designated
elements.label: text

elements.text: as an “Authorized Employee” on the Seller’s Form 988SF, Certificate of Incumbency for
elements.label: text

elements.text: a Bank, Savings Bank, Savings and Loan Association, Credit Union, Corporation or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Limited Liability Company, or Form 989SF, Certificate of Incumbency for Limited
elements.label: text

elements.text: Partnerships, as applicable.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The account identified in Form 1132 for the payment of fees must be a Demand Deposit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Account that is separate from any Custodial Account required to be maintained pursuant
elements.label: text

elements.text: to any of the Purchase Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller agrees to notify Freddie Mac immediately at SellerBilling@FreddieMac.com
elements.label: text

elements.text: of any changes to the status of the Seller’s ACH account.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii)Insufficient funds policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: If funds in the Seller’s ACH account are insufficient to cover the statement amount, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller’s ACH account is invalid, or Freddie Mac is unable to draft from the Seller’s ACH
elements.label: text

elements.text: account for any reason, the statement will be subject to the late payment fees described in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6303.2(b). In that event, the Seller must remit the amount due in accordance with
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions provided by Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will not assess any late payment fee if funds in the Seller’s ACH account are
elements.label: text

elements.text: insufficient to cover the amount due from a daily ACH draft or if Freddie Mac is unable
elements.label: text

elements.text: to draft from the Seller’s ACH account under the daily ACH process for any reason. If
elements.label: text

elements.text: any Seller ACH account amount due to Freddie Mac remains outstanding on the due date
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the Seller’s monthly statement, the Seller will be assessed the late payment fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: described in Section 6303.2(b) on such outstanding amount from and after that due date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Late payment policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: Fees and remittances not made when due are subject to a late payment fee, which includes an
elements.label: text

elements.text: interest reimbursement charge. The interest on unpaid amounts is calculated as of the last day
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the month in which the payment is due. Unless specified in the Guide for particular fees,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the interest rate is the highest quoted prime rate on the last Business Day of the month plus
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3.000%. The prime rate reference is typically the Money Rates section of The Wall Street
elements.label: text

elements.text: Journal. In its absence, Freddie Mac will determine the rate.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The late payment fee calculation follows this formula:
elements.label: text

elements.text: (Amount paid late or past due) × (Prime rate + 3.000%) / 365 × Number of days in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: unpaid month.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac reserves the right to impose a late payment fee on any Seller/Servicer for
elements.label: text

elements.text: untimely payments or required remittances, whether invoiced or not and regardless of billing
elements.label: text

elements.text: notification method. The repurchase late fee will appear in the Seller account activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: statement as described in Section 6303.1(a) and will be drafted from the Seller’s ACH
elements.label: text

elements.text: account as per Section 6303.2(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to the interest reimbursement and other legal remedies, Freddie Mac may:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Demand payment before the Funding Date despite other provisions in the Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Postpone Settlement Dates for Pools with unpaid fees as of five Business Days before the
elements.label: text

elements.text: proposed date
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac retains the right to adjust the late payment fee structure, which may involve
elements.label: text

elements.text: changes to the interest rate, calculation methods or implementation of minimum fees or
elements.label: text

elements.text: penalties.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additionally, Freddie Mac can modify the terms and procedures for crediting and payment of
elements.label: text

elements.text: proceeds, fees and remittances. Such changes require a 30-day written notice to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer. They may also necessitate pre-Settlement Date payments for reasons other
elements.label: text

elements.text: than timely payment obligation breaches, with procedures defined at the time.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 6304: Document Custody
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 6304.1: Custody of Notes and assignments (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains the requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivery of original Notes
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Definition and scope of Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivery instructions for Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Delivery of original Notes
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer selling Mortgages to Freddie Mac must deliver the original Notes for
elements.label: text

elements.text: such Mortgages to a Document Custodian, which may be a Designated Custodian or another
elements.label: text

elements.text: approved Document Custodian, chosen by the Seller/Servicer in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of Sections 2202.1(b) and 2202.2. Freddie Mac does not accept duplicate Notes
elements.label: text

elements.text: or corrected Notes.
elements.label: text

elements.text: However, Freddie Mac may in special instructions, program announcements or individual
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage Purchase Contracts, require the Notes to be delivered to a Designated Custodian.
elements.label: text

elements.text: For example, the Notes for Mortgages (other than eMortgages) sold through Cash-Released
elements.label: text

elements.text: XChange® must be delivered to a Document Custodian listed in Exhibit 43, Cash-Released
elements.label: text

elements.text: XChange® Document Custodians, as set forth in Section 2202.2(c).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Definition and scope of Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: For purposes of delivering Notes to a Document Custodian, the term “Note” includes the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note evidencing the indebtedness along with any power of attorney or any applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: modifying instrument, such as a modification, a conversion agreement or an assumption of
elements.label: text

elements.text: indebtedness and release of liability agreement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The term “assignment” refers to the Intervening Assignment and to the instrument necessary
elements.label: text

elements.text: to assign the Security Instrument to Freddie Mac, as described in Section 6301.2(d).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Delivery instructions for Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: When delivering Notes to the Document Custodian, the Seller/Servicer must also deliver all
elements.label: text

elements.text: original assignments as described in Sections 6301.2(d)(i) through 6301.2(d)(iii), unless the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage is registered with MERS® and the Seller/Servicer has elected to retain all
elements.label: text

elements.text: assignments for MERS-registered Mortgages in the Mortgage files.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Seller has so elected for MERS-registered Mortgages, the Seller/Servicer must provide
elements.label: text

elements.text: its Document Custodian with documentation that will enable the Document Custodian to
elements.label: text

elements.text: verify that the Seller/Servicer has elected to hold assignments in the Mortgage files for
elements.label: text

elements.text: MERS-registered Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The following table indicates which Guide sections to reference for delivery instructions to
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Document Custodian based on the type of Mortgage closing used:
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6304.2: Delivery of Notes and assignments to a
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Document Custodian (12/03/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivery of Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivery of Notes and assignments for Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Delivery of Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: In accordance with Section 6301.4(a), the Seller/Servicer must deliver the following items to
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Document Custodian:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Form 1034E, Custodial Certification Schedule: The Seller/Servicer must deliver Form
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1034E, or the Note Delivery Cover Sheet, to the Document Custodian.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgage documents: For each Mortgage, the original Note (endorsed as required in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6301.2(a)), along with the originals of any riders or other modifying instruments
elements.label: text

elements.text: to the Note. The information on the Note must match the information for the
elements.label: text

elements.text: corresponding Mortgage in Loan Selling Advisor®.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assignments: All original Intervening Assignments of the Security Instruments prepared
elements.label: text

elements.text: and completed as required in Section 6301.2(d).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Delivery of Notes and assignments for Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: For each Cooperative Share Loan, in addition to meeting the requirements of Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6304.3(a), the Seller/Servicer must deliver the following to the Document Custodian:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original stock certificate, membership certificate or other instrument or agreement of
elements.label: text

elements.text: similar import that is commonly used and is valid and enforceable in the applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: jurisdiction and evidences the Shareholder’s ownership interest in the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original stock power, executed in blank,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original Proprietary Lease, occupancy agreement or other agreement of similar import
elements.label: text

elements.text: that is commonly used and is valid and enforceable in the applicable jurisdiction,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original assignment of Proprietary Lease executed in the name of Seller or blank,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A copy of recorded UCC-1 financing statements and renewal assignment statements, if
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable, with original filing stamp,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original Form UCC-3 assigning interest to Freddie Mac in a form suitable for filing, but
elements.label: text

elements.text: not filed,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original security agreement, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original Recognition Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6304.3: Document Custodian’s functions and duties
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: upon receiving Notes and assignments (12/17/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Verifications
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Certification process
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Electronically recorded documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Duties to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Verifications
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Verification of Notes and assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon receiving the Notes and assignments from the Seller/Servicer for Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivered for purchase by Freddie Mac, the Document Custodian must verify and certify
elements.label: text

elements.text: that the following requirements have been met:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Note: The information on each Note matches all corresponding loan data for the
elements.label: text

elements.text: related Mortgage contained in Loan Selling Advisor®. The Document Custodian is
elements.label: text

elements.text: not required to verify the Seller/Servicer number.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Note endorsement: Each Note is endorsed as required by Section 6301.2(a). If the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer delivering the Note is not the original payee on the Note, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Document Custodian must verify that the chain of endorsements is proper and
elements.label: text

elements.text: complete from the original payee on the Note to the Seller delivering the Note to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac (not to the Servicer).
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assignments: The assignments of the Security Instruments from the original
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgagee to the Seller/Servicer or to MERS® are prepared, executed and recorded
elements.label: text

elements.text: where required, in accordance with Sections 6301.2(d) and 7101.4(a). The
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer must provide its Document Custodian with any documentation
elements.label: text

elements.text: necessary for the Document Custodian to determine whether the Seller/Servicer has
elements.label: text

elements.text: elected to retain physical custody of all assignments for Mortgages registered with
elements.label: text

elements.text: MERS and store the assignments in the Mortgage files, as provided in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Verification of Notes and assignments for Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: For each Cooperative Share Loan, in addition to the requirements in Section 6304.3(a)(i),
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Document Custodian must verify that the Seller has delivered to Document Custodian
elements.label: text

elements.text: and has in its possession the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original stock certificate, membership certificate or other instrument or agreement of
elements.label: text

elements.text: similar import that is commonly used and is valid and enforceable in the applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: jurisdiction and evidences the Shareholder’s ownership interest in the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original stock power, executed in blank,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original Proprietary Lease, occupancy agreement or other agreement of similar
elements.label: text

elements.text: import that is commonly used and is valid and enforceable in the applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: jurisdiction,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original assignment of Proprietary Lease executed in the name of Seller or in blank,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A copy of recorded UCC-1 financing statements and renewal assignment statements,
elements.label: text

elements.text: if applicable, with original filing stamp,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original Form UCC-3 assigning interest to Freddie Mac in a form suitable for filing,
elements.label: text

elements.text: but not filed,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original security agreement, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original Recognition Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Certification process
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Document Custodian must comply with the applicable requirements of the Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Documents when certifying Mortgages delivered for purchase by Freddie Mac. Refer to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Document Custody Procedures Handbook for additional information.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Document Custodian must not execute the Custodian Certification for a Mortgage if any
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the information on the related Note, required to be verified and certified, does not match
elements.label: text

elements.text: the corresponding loan data for the related Mortgage in Loan Selling Advisor as set forth in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6304.3(a) or if any discrepancy is not sufficiently justified.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Document Custodian must notify the delivering Seller/Servicer of any error, omission or
elements.label: text

elements.text: other discrepancy that requires corrective action.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Electronically recorded documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: See Sections 1401.3(d) and 1401.3(e) for information and instructions regarding
elements.label: text

elements.text: electronically recorded paper documents and/or electronically recorded Electronic (as that
elements.label: text

elements.text: term is defined in Section 1401.1(b)) documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Duties to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon certification of the Notes, the Document Custodian must maintain physical custody of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Notes, any assignments, any power of attorney, any modification agreement and any other
elements.label: text

elements.text: documents relating to the Mortgage, and, for Cooperative Share Loans, the documents listed
elements.label: text

elements.text: in Section 6304.2(b), in trust, for the benefit of Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See Sections 8107.2(b) and (c) for requirements related to the physical or constructive
elements.label: text

elements.text: possession of the Note in connection with the Servicing of a Mortgage.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 6305: Warehouse Financing
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Arrangements
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6305.1: Warehouse financing arrangements (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This chapter addresses arrangements in which the Seller has entered into a Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement with a Warehouse Lender and has granted that Warehouse Lender a security interest
elements.label: text

elements.text: in or conveyed to that Warehouse Lender an ownership interest in, certain Mortgages that are
elements.label: text

elements.text: subsequently offered for sale to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: In these situations, the Warehouse Lender also holds the Note and, at times, ancillary documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: for those Mortgages and delivers the Note (and, at times, ancillary documents) to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: pursuant to the Seller’s Purchase Contract with Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Subject to certain conditions, the Document Custodian will hold the Note and any ancillary
elements.label: text

elements.text: documents relating to the Pledged Mortgages pending their purchase by Freddie Mac. This
elements.label: text

elements.text: chapter sets forth and explains the relationships among the Seller, the Warehouse Lender and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: For additional requirements related to Pledged eMortgages, see Sections 1402.3(d) and
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6305.2: Delivery and general procedures for Pledged
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Mortgages (12/03/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivery and acceptance of Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivery procedures for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Rejection of Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Delivery and acceptance of Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the requirements of this chapter have been met, and until Freddie Mac purchases a Pledged
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage, the Document Custodian will hold the Note and any ancillary documents for that
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pledged Mortgage subject to the interest of the Warehouse Lender created under the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Warehouse Agreement unless Freddie Mac specifically agrees otherwise in writing.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac does not recognize any other statements or conditions regarding its receipt of
elements.label: text

elements.text: these documents, including:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Trust receipts,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Bailee letters, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Other purported statement of a continuing security or other interest
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Delivery procedures for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: For delivery under a Purchase Contract, the Seller must submit Form 996E, Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Provider Release and Transfer, which includes an Appendix I showing the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Each Mortgage in the delivery,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Freddie Mac contract number,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac loan number,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ UPB,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Borrower’s name, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The address of the Mortgaged Premises
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may, in its sole discretion, require the Seller, Warehouse Lender and, in certain
elements.label: text

elements.text: circumstances, Document Custodian to enter into an addendum to the Form 996E (such
elements.label: text

elements.text: addendum sometimes referred to as a “Quad Party Agreement”).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Rejection of Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: If Freddie Mac decides not to purchase a Pledged Mortgage, the Seller will be notified of
elements.label: text

elements.text: such decision, and the Note for that Pledged Mortgage will be delivered to the Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lender indicated on Form 996E or to that Warehouse Lender’s document custodian.
elements.label: text

elements.text: With each delivery of Pledged Mortgages to be sold to Freddie Mac for cash through

elements.text: 1. Submit a completed, executed and duly authorized Form 987E, Wire Transfer

elements.label: text

elements.text: This form is a general wire transfer authorization for all contracts under which
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pledged Mortgages are offered for sale to Freddie Mac using Loan Selling Advisor. A
elements.label: text

elements.text: separate Form 987E is not required for each contract, but the Seller must:

elements.text: ■ Execute a Form 987E for each of the Seller’s Warehouse Lenders,

elements.text: ■ Provide Freddie Mac with a new Form 987E for any change to the wire transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Deliver Form 987E to Freddie Mac as an Electronic Record (as defined in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1401.1(b)), using a Portable Document Format (PDF) (or other Electronic Record
elements.label: text

elements.text: format commonly used in the mortgage industry), that has been completed and
elements.label: text

elements.text: contains the copy or representation of the pen and ink signature of the Authorized
elements.label: text

elements.text: Employee (such copy or representation of the Authorized Employee’s signature
elements.label: text

elements.text: shall be such Authorized Employee’s adopted Electronic Signature as defined in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1401.1(b)) and either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ An attachment to an e-mail sent to CashCollections@FreddieMac.com, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ An upload through the Freddie Mac eBill system
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2. Complete Form 996E, Warehouse Provider Release and Transfer, available only
elements.label: text

elements.text: through Loan Selling Advisor, for the Warehouse Lender to submit to Freddie Mac in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan Selling Advisor by no later than 12:30 p.m. Eastern time on the Business Day
elements.label: text

elements.text: immediately preceding the Funding Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Delivery of Electronic records and signatures
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac and the Seller agree that delivery of Electronic Records with Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Signatures are eligible Electronic Transactions, as defined in Section 1401.1(b), and are
elements.label: text

elements.text: governed by the applicable provisions of Chapter 1401.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If Freddie Mac does not receive wire transfer instructions on Form 987E or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Warehouse Lender’s release or transfer of its interest in the Pledged Mortgages on Form
elements.label: text

elements.text: 996E in sufficient time to process payments, Freddie Mac may, in its sole discretion,
elements.label: text

elements.text: postpone the Funding Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If Freddie Mac does not receive the Warehouse Lender’s Form 990SF, Agreement and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Certificate of Incumbency: Warehouse Lender, in sufficient time to process it and to
elements.label: text

elements.text: assign User Roles for the Warehouse Lender’s access to Loan Selling Advisor or believes
elements.label: text

elements.text: that the Certificate of Incumbency cannot be relied upon, or that its information is not
elements.label: text

elements.text: reliable, Freddie Mac may, in its sole discretion, postpone the Funding Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) UMBS, MBS and WAC ARM PC delivery instructions for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Completing wire transfer information
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Pledged Mortgages allocated to a Guarantor or MultiLender Swap Contract, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller must complete:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ All requested wire transfer information and instructions in the applicable screens in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan Selling Advisor
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Form 996E, which the Warehouse Lender must submit to Freddie Mac as described in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6305.4(b)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Authorization requirements for employees
elements.label: text

elements.text: The employee authorized to perform the Setup Manager role (to approve wire transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: information and instructions in the applicable Loan Selling Advisor screens on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller’s behalf) must be an “Authorized Employee” on the Seller’s Certificate(s) of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Incumbency (See Section 2201.1 for additional information.) If the person performing the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Setup Manager role is not an Authorized Employee, Freddie Mac may postpone the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Settlement Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: See Section 2403.2(b) regarding designating Authorized Employees. See Sections
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6203.3(c), 6204.3(c) and 6205.3(c) for additional instructions for delivering Certificates
elements.label: text

elements.text: of Incumbency and submitting Form 996E for fixed-rate Guarantor, WAC ARM
elements.label: text

elements.text: Guarantor and MultiLender Swap Contracts, respectively.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii)Submission of Warehouse Provider release and transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: The person who submits Form 996E for the Warehouse Lender must be authorized on
elements.label: text

elements.text: Form 990SF to provide Freddie Mac with instructions (or to modify instructions) to
elements.label: text

elements.text: transfer funds on behalf of the Warehouse Lender. (See Section 6305.4(c) for additional
elements.label: text

elements.text: information.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may, in its sole discretion, postpone the Settlement Date if:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The person submitting Form 996E is not an Authorized Employee,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac does not receive Form 990SF in sufficient time to process it, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac believes that the Certificate of Incumbency cannot be relied upon or that
elements.label: text

elements.text: the information on the Certificate of Incumbency is unreliable

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac believes that the Certificate of Incumbency cannot be relied upon or that
elements.label: text

elements.text: the information on the Certificate of Incumbency is unreliable
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6305.4: Warehouse Lender and Seller responsibilities
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Warehouse Lender’s interest
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller representations and warranties for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Special Warehouse Lender acknowledgments and agreements
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Warehouse Lender’s interest
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Conditions for assignments
elements.label: text

elements.text: No Pledged Mortgage will be accepted for purchase by Freddie Mac if the Seller has
elements.label: text

elements.text: assigned the Mortgage to a Warehouse Lender unless one of the following applies:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The assignment of the Pledged Mortgage has been recorded in the public records, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Seller obtains an assignment of the Mortgage in favor of the Seller that is
elements.label: text

elements.text: executed by the Warehouse Lender, in recordable form, to be effective on or before
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Settlement Date of the Pledged Mortgage. Such assignment must be promptly
elements.label: text

elements.text: recorded in the public records of the appropriate jurisdiction by the Seller after the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Settlement Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The assignment of the Mortgage to the Warehouse Lender was not recorded, and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Warehouse Lender returns that unrecorded assignment to the Seller prior to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Settlement Date
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Conditions for financing statements
elements.label: text

elements.text: No Pledged Mortgage will be accepted for purchase by Freddie Mac if the Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lender has filed a financing statement relating to the Pledged Mortgage in the public
elements.label: text

elements.text: records of any jurisdiction unless:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller obtains an executed termination statement from the Warehouse Lender to
elements.label: text

elements.text: be filed promptly in the public records of the appropriate jurisdiction by the Seller
elements.label: text

elements.text: after the Settlement Date, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The security interest in the Pledged Mortgage by its express terms will be released
elements.label: text

elements.text: automatically upon Freddie Mac’s purchase of the Pledged Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Seller representations and warranties for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller represents and warrants to, and covenants with, Freddie Mac that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ As of the Settlement Date, each Pledged Mortgage is free and clear of any and all
elements.label: text

elements.text: security interests, claims and encumbrances of any third party, including, without
elements.label: text

elements.text: limitation, the Warehouse Lender and any party claiming through the Warehouse Lender,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller will take or will cause the Warehouse Lender to take all such further action,
elements.label: text

elements.text: including, without limitation, preparing, executing and filing additional documents and
elements.label: text

elements.text: instruments to assure and confirm to Freddie Mac that each Pledged Mortgage is free and
elements.label: text

elements.text: clear of any and all security interests, claims and encumbrances and that absolute and
elements.label: text

elements.text: unencumbered title to the Pledged Mortgage is conveyed to Freddie Mac as of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Settlement Date, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The wire transfer or UMBS®, MBS or WAC ARM PC delivery instructions delivered to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac are in accordance with the Seller’s Warehouse Agreement and that the
elements.label: text

elements.text: person providing the wire transfer or UMBS, MBS or WAC ARM PC delivery
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions is an “Authorized Employee” on the Certificate of Incumbency. (See Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2201.1 for additional information.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Special Warehouse Lender acknowledgments and agreements
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Form 990SF, Agreement and Certificate of Incumbency: Warehouse Lender
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Submission of Form 990SF
elements.label: text

elements.text: Each Warehouse Lender must provide Freddie Mac with an agreement and certificate
elements.label: text

elements.text: of incumbency (“Certificate of Incumbency”) on Form 990SF with Exhibit A, which
elements.label: text

elements.text: is a copy of resolution by the Warehouse Lender’s board of directors or other
elements.label: text

elements.text: governing body (the “Resolution”) in the form provided by Freddie Mac (unless
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable law or other circumstances require another form).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Resolution must empower and authorize (a) employees identified by title or by
elements.label: text

elements.text: name and title on the Form 990SF (each, an “Authorized Employee”) to provide
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions, or modifications of instructions, to Freddie Mac in conjunction with a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller’s sale of Pledged Mortgages to Freddie Mac through Loan Selling Advisor®
elements.label: text

elements.text: and (b) authorize Administrators to grant access to Authorized Employees with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: External WHL Approver and External WHL Reviewer role.
elements.label: text

elements.text: A new Warehouse Lender will not be given access to Loan Selling Advisor until
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac has accepted the Warehouse Lender’s Form 990SF. Any person
elements.label: text

elements.text: identified on Form 990SF as performing the External WHL Approver and External
elements.label: text

elements.text: WHL Reviewer roles (to submit Form 996E, Warehouse Provider Release and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer, through Loan Selling Advisor) must be designated as an Authorized
elements.label: text

elements.text: Employee authorized to provide Freddie Mac with wire transfer instructions on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Warehouse Lender’s Form 990SF.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Electronic record requirements and legal obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Certificate of Incumbency must contain either the pen and ink signature or an
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic copy or representation of the pen and ink signature of each Authorized
elements.label: text

elements.text: Employee.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Certificate of Incumbency, Resolution and any other required documents or
elements.label: text

elements.text: forms, signed by the Warehouse Lender’s Secretary, Assistant Secretary or legal
elements.label: text

elements.text: counsel must be delivered to Freddie Mac as an Electronic Record, as defined in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1401.1(b), in Portable Document Format (PDF) and contain an Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Signature, as defined in Section 1401.1(b).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Electronic Signature must meet the requirements contained in Form 990SF itself
elements.label: text

elements.text: and, at a minimum, be a copy or representation of the pen and ink signature of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Warehouse Lender’s signatory attached thereto or logically associated therewith.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Although Freddie Mac reserves the right to verify or authenticate any Seller/Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: request for a change, the Seller/Servicer may not consider Freddie Mac’s failure to do
elements.label: text

elements.text: so an act of negligence.
elements.label: text

elements.text: By executing the complete Certificate of Incumbency and delivering it to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac, the Warehouse Lender makes the same representations and warranties
elements.label: text

elements.text: to, and covenants with, Freddie Mac as Sellers make to Freddie Mac in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may, periodically and at its sole discretion, require the Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lender to submit a new Form 990SF and/or Resolution. The Warehouse Lender must
elements.label: text

elements.text: renew its Form 990SF every two years and its Resolution every four years and
elements.label: text

elements.text: determine if such renewal requires new or modified Wire Transfer Instructions.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will notify the Warehouse Lender approximately 120 days before the
elements.label: text

elements.text: renewal due date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If a Warehouse Lender fails timely to deliver a replacement Certificate of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Incumbency, Freddie Mac may, in its sole discretion, cancel or postpone purchasing
elements.label: text

elements.text: any Pledged Mortgages financed by that Warehouse Lender until a renewal
elements.label: text

elements.text: Certificate of Incumbency has been accepted by Freddie Mac and any other
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements have been met. The Warehouse Lender shall indemnify and hold
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac, its directors, officers, employees, successors, assigns and fiscal and
elements.label: text

elements.text: transfer agents harmless from and against the consequences of any such cancelation
elements.label: text

elements.text: or postponement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Form 996E
elements.label: text

elements.text: In connection with Freddie Mac’s purchase of Pledged Mortgages, the Warehouse Lender
elements.label: text

elements.text: must submit Form 996E to Freddie Mac through Loan Selling Advisor.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will not accept a “bailee letter” or equivalent documentation with
elements.label: text

elements.text: respect to any Pledged Mortgage. If a Warehouse Lender or any other party
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivers such a document to Freddie Mac, Freddie Mac has the right, in its sole
elements.label: text

elements.text: discretion, to cancel or postpone the Settlement Date for the related Pledged
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage(s).
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6305.5: Liability and indemnification (12/03/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Liability for a postponed Settlement Date for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller indemnification
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reimbursement by the Seller for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Liability for a postponed Settlement Date for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will not be liable to the Seller, the Warehouse Lender or any third party for any
elements.label: text

elements.text: losses, costs, expenses or damages that such party may incur if the Settlement Date for a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pledged Mortgage is postponed due to the Seller’s failure to deliver wire transfer instructions
elements.label: text

elements.text: (Form 987E, Wire Transfer Authorization for a Cash Warehouse Delivery) into the
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable Loan Selling Advisor® screens or Form 996E, Warehouse Provider Release and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer, because the person executing Form 987E, the contact person on Form 996E or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: employee performing the Loan Selling Advisor Setup Manager role is not designated as an
elements.label: text

elements.text: “Authorized Employee” on the Seller’s Certificate of Incumbency. (See Section 2201.1 for
elements.label: text

elements.text: additional information.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Seller indemnification
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller agrees to indemnify and hold Freddie Mac, its successors, assigns and transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: agents harmless from and against any and all losses, claims, demands, actions, suits,
elements.label: text

elements.text: damages, costs and expenses (including reasonable attorney fees) of every nature and
elements.label: text

elements.text: character that may arise or be made against or be incurred by Freddie Mac as a result of any
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The deposit of the Note and any ancillary documents with, and their maintenance by, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Document Custodian pending Freddie Mac’s purchase of the Mortgages or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: determination not to purchase certain Mortgages (and the subsequent return of rejected
elements.label: text

elements.text: Notes and any ancillary documents)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The delivery or transfer of any Purchase Proceeds by Freddie Mac or its agent to any
elements.label: text

elements.text: person if:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Such Purchase Proceeds in the form of a UMBS®, MBS or WAC ARM PC are
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivered in accordance with the terms of the Purchase Documents and security wire
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions inserted in Loan Selling Advisor screens, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Such Purchase Proceeds are delivered in accordance with the Purchase Documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: and the Seller’s wire transfer instructions on Form 987E
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller’s failure to provide any of the following forms, as applicable, that designate
elements.label: text

elements.text: employees authorized to provide Freddie Mac with wire transfer instructions (or modify
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions) to transfer funds or securities on the Seller’s behalf:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Form 988SF, Certificate of Incumbency for a Bank, Savings Bank, Savings and Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: Association, Credit Union, Corporation or Limited Liability Company
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Form 988SF – HFA, Certificate of Incumbency for Housing Finance Agency
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Form 989SF, Certificate of Incumbency for Limited Partnerships
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller’s failure to provide complete, accurate and authorized wire transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: instructions or failure to notify Freddie Mac of any necessary or desired changes to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: authorized wire transfer instructions
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Security interests, claims, encumbrances of any third party, including any Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lender, or the failure of any third party, including any Warehouse Lender, to release or to
elements.label: text

elements.text: transfer to Freddie Mac all of the rights, title and interest of whatever nature the third
elements.label: text

elements.text: party may have with respect to or in the Note
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The failure of the Warehouse Lender to submit any required forms or documents,
elements.label: text

elements.text: including Form 990SF, Agreement and Certificate of Incumbency: Warehouse Lender, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Form 996E to Freddie Mac as described in Section 6305.4(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Reimbursement by the Seller for Pledged Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: No fees in addition to those associated with specific Mortgage programs described elsewhere
elements.label: text

elements.text: in this Guide are charged pursuant to a delivery of Pledged Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller agrees to the following reimbursement obligations:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller must reimburse Freddie Mac for any reasonable expenses incurred by
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac in connection with the delivery of Pledged Mortgages by Warehouse
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lenders to Freddie Mac. The nature and amount of such expenses will be specified in a
elements.label: text

elements.text: written notice to the Seller from Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller must reimburse Freddie Mac for the amount of any such expenses within 10
elements.label: text

elements.text: Business Days of request by Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 6306: Correspondent XChange®
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 6306.1: Correspondent XChange®
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains the requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller participation requirements for Correspondent XChange®
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transfer of data to aggregators for Operational Bifurcated Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Agreement and obligations under Correspondent Xchange
elements.label: text

elements.text: The provisions of this chapter apply to Correspondent XChange, one of the executions available
elements.label: text

elements.text: under Servicing-Released XChange®, Freddie Mac’s suite of executions that provides market
elements.label: text

elements.text: liquidity for Servicing Contract Rights and helps Sellers easily transfer Servicing to an approved
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Seller participation requirements for Correspondent XChange
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sellers must apply to Freddie Mac for approval and access to participate in Correspondent
elements.label: text

elements.text: XChange as an Originator pursuant to the terms of Exhibit 29, Correspondent XChange®
elements.label: text

elements.text: Operational Bifurcation Multi-Party Agreement. Sellers must call their Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: representative or Customer Service at 800-FREDDIE to inquire about the Correspondent
elements.label: text

elements.text: XChange Originator approval process.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac-approved Originators will be provided appropriate access to the execution
elements.label: text

elements.text: option.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Transfer of data to aggregators for Operational Bifurcated Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Under Correspondent XChange, Sellers that originate Freddie Mac-eligible Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (“Originators” as defined in Exhibit 29) use Third Party Transaction Services functionality in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan Selling Advisor® to transfer the data for their Mortgages to certain Freddie Mac￾approved aggregators with whom they have an agreement to sell these Originator Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: for cash.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The aggregators are Freddie Mac Sellers approved to sell Operational Bifurcated Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Agreement and obligations under Correspondent Xchange
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Originator and the Seller each agree to be bound by the terms and conditions set forth in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exhibit 29, for each Operational Bifurcated Mortgage sold by the Originator to the Seller and
elements.label: text

elements.text: then by the Seller to Freddie Mac under Correspondent XChange. For these Mortgages, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: liability for “Origination and Sale Obligations” and “Servicing Obligations,” each of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: obligations as described and defined in Exhibit 29, is allocated by Freddie Mac in accordance
elements.label: text

elements.text: with the provisions of Sections 7101.3(c) through 7101.3(f) and Exhibit 29.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 6307: Co-Issue XChange®
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 6307.1: Co-Issue XChange®
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller participation requirements for Co-Issue XChange®
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Other Guide provisions related to Co-Issue XChange and Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Co-Issue XChange cash pricing
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Funding adjustments and net funding
elements.label: text

elements.text: The provisions of this chapter apply to Mortgages sold through Co-Issue XChange, one of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: executions available under Servicing-Released XChange®, Freddie Mac’s suite of executions
elements.label: text

elements.text: that provides market liquidity for Servicing Contract Rights and helps Sellers transfer Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contract Rights to a Freddie Mac-approved Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Seller participation requirements for Co-Issue XChange
elements.label: text

elements.text: To participate in Co-Issue XChange as a Seller pursuant to the terms of Exhibit 26,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement for Concurrent Transfer of Single-Family Mortgage Servicing Contract Rights
elements.label: text

elements.text: With Complete/Full Bifurcation, the Seller must apply to Freddie Mac for approval.
elements.label: text

elements.text: To inquire about the Co-Issue XChange Originator approval process, Sellers should contact
elements.label: text

elements.text: their Freddie Mac representative or call Customer Service at 800-FREDDIE.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac-approved Sellers will receive access to the Co-Issue XChange execution option
elements.label: text

elements.text: in Loan Selling Advisor®
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Other Guide provisions related to Co-Issue XChange and Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: See Sections 7101.1(b) and 7101.3(c) through (f) for additional information and requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: pertaining to Transfers of Servicing.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Co-Issue XChange cash pricing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac has developed a process under Co-Issue XChange that is available through
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan Selling Advisor that permits a Seller to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Obtain a price from, and simultaneously sell Mortgages to, Freddie Mac,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transfer the Servicing Contract Rights related to those Mortgages to a Servicer, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Receive a price from Freddie Mac that includes the purchase of the Mortgage(s) and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: price offered by the Transferee Servicer for the Servicing Contract Rights related to each
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage (the “Co-Issue All-in Price Process”).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller may participate in the Co-Issue All-in Price Process only if the Servicer has
elements.label: text

elements.text: elected with Freddie Mac to participate in the Co-Issue All-in Process with the Seller.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Prices and fees provided when the Seller enters into a Mandatory Cash Contract or a Best
elements.label: text

elements.text: Efforts Contract through Co-Issue XChange are not final; instead, the prices and fees are
elements.label: text

elements.text: determined as of the Funding Date based on the Mortgage data provided by the Seller.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller must supply all Mortgage data requested by Loan Selling Advisor (in the fields
elements.label: text

elements.text: titled “Loan Fields Required for Pricing” and “Additional Loan Fields That Affect Pricing”)
elements.label: text

elements.text: so the Servicer may provide an accurate bid for the assignment and assumption of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Contract Rights.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Funding adjustments and net funding
elements.label: text

elements.text: Funding adjustments are composed of the Escrow funds, interest adjustment, Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Spread, tax service fee, transaction fee and temporary subsidy buydown funds. The amount
elements.label: text

elements.text: of funding adjustments will be identified on the Funding Date as follows:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Seller enters in Loan Selling Advisor the amounts held as Escrow funds and
elements.label: text

elements.text: temporary subsidy buydown funds for each Mortgage sold servicing-released, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan Selling Advisor calculates the interest adjustment, Servicing Spread, tax service fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: and transaction fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Refer to Section 6302.51 for additional information regarding delivery requirements for
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages sold servicing-released under Mandatory Cash Contracts or Best Efforts
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contracts.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller is responsible for the accuracy of the Escrow fund amounts and temporary subsidy
elements.label: text

elements.text: buydown fund amounts that the Seller submits via Loan Selling Advisor. Freddie Mac does
elements.label: text

elements.text: not edit or validate these amounts. On the Funding Date, Freddie Mac will deduct the amount
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the funding adjustments from the sales proceeds paid by Freddie Mac for the purchase of
elements.label: text

elements.text: each Mortgage sold through Co-Issue XChange. Freddie Mac will forward the deducted
elements.label: text

elements.text: amount of the funding adjustments to the Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller and the Servicer are responsible for any reconciliation, correction or adjustment to
elements.label: text

elements.text: the amount of Escrow funds or temporary subsidy buydown funds transferred to the Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will not adjust, calculate, refund or pay any amounts with respect to the Escrow
elements.label: text

elements.text: funds or temporary subsidy buydown funds after the Funding Date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will conduct quality control activities relating to the sale representations and
elements.label: text

elements.text: warranties with the Seller. The Seller agrees that Freddie Mac may share with the Transferee
elements.label: text
