elements.text: Servicer information regarding the Mortgages sold to Freddie Mac through Co-Issue
elements.label: text

elements.text: XChange, including, but not limited to, quality control findings, the Seller’s response to
elements.label: text

elements.text: quality control findings and defect reports.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 6401: Nondelivery
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Pairoff overview
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Pairoff procedures for Cash, Guarantor and MultiLender Swap Purchase Contracts
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Pairoff procedures for Commitment Amounts
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Payment of pairoff fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Pairoff overview
elements.label: text

elements.text: A pairoff constitutes fulfillment of a mandatory obligation to deliver Mortgages to Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac under the Cash, Guarantor or MultiLender Swap programs.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller may pair off a cash Purchase Contract or a mandatory obligation to deliver
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages under a Pricing Identifier by repurchasing all or any portion of the respective
elements.label: text

elements.text: contract in lieu of selling the Mortgages to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Failure to deliver Mortgages pursuant to the terms of the respective contract or to otherwise
elements.label: text

elements.text: fulfill a mandatory obligation to deliver Mortgages to Freddie Mac according to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of this section subjects the Seller to the remedies for nondelivery provided in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Guide.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Best Efforts Contracts are not mandatory, and pairoff requirements do not apply. See
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6101.2(b) for additional requirements applicable to Best Efforts Contracts.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Pairoff procedures for Cash, Guarantor and MultiLender Swap Purchase Contracts
elements.label: text

elements.text: The pairoff amount for a Purchase Contract with a mandatory obligation to deliver Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: is equal to the Commitment Amount of such Purchase Contract, less the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The applicable purchase tolerance (equal to the greater of 2.5% of the Purchase Contract
elements.label: text

elements.text: amount or $10,000), and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The number of Mortgages previously purchased by Freddie Mac under the applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: Purchase Contract
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller may choose to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Request a pairoff via Loan Selling Advisor® prior to the Purchase Contract Expiration
elements.label: text

elements.text: Date using the pairoff functionality as described in Section 6101.2(a)(iv)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Have Loan Selling Advisor automatically calculate the pairoff fee after the Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contract Expiration Date
elements.label: text

elements.text: The pairoff process is “two-way” and, depending on market conditions, may result in either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A fee due to Freddie Mac from the Seller; or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A fee due to the Seller from Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pairoff fees calculated and provided by Loan Selling Advisor are non-negotiable.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Pairoff procedures for Commitment Amounts
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller may pair off a Commitment Amount associated with a Pricing Identifier that has a
elements.label: text

elements.text: mandatory obligation to deliver Mortgages at any time before and including the Pricing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Identifier Expiration Date. The Seller makes a pairoff request by contacting its Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: account manager.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The pairoff amount shall equal the applicable Commitment Amount, less the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The purchase tolerance associated with the Pricing Identifier, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Commitment Amount of any Cash Purchase Contracts fulfilled under the Pricing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Identifier plus the UPB of Mortgages previously purchased by Freddie Mac under
elements.label: text

elements.text: Guarantor or MultiLender Swap Purchase Contracts taken out in connection with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pricing Identifier
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will determine the amount of the pairoff fee and quote it to the Seller.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pairoff fees will be included in the Seller’s invoice and must be paid as set forth in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Payment of pairoff fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pairoff fees will be included in the Seller’s monthly invoice and must be paid as set forth in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 6303. Freddie Mac reserves the right to amend the provisions of this section relating
elements.label: text

elements.text: to the Loan Selling Advisor pairoff process without prior notice.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6401.2: Penalty for nondelivery (09/03/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: In addition to any other remedies it may have under law or in equity, Freddie Mac reserves the
elements.label: text

elements.text: right, in its sole discretion, to take any appropriate action to protect its interest and enforce its
elements.label: text

elements.text: rights in the event of nondelivery under a mandatory obligation to deliver Mortgages under the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cash, Guarantor or MultiLender Swap programs, including, but not limited to, disqualification or
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspension of the Seller from eligibility to sell Mortgages to Freddie Mac under Chapter 2301.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller can fulfill mandatory obligations to deliver Mortgages under a mandatory Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contract by initiating a pairoff (see Section 6401.1).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 7101: Transfers of Servicing and Intra￾Servicer Portfolio Moves
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 7101.1: Requests for Transfers of Servicing and Intra￾Servicer Portfolio Moves (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transfer of Servicing overview
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Submitting requests for Transfers of Servicing and Intra-Servicer Portfolio Moves
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Transfer of Servicing overview
elements.label: text

elements.text: Subject to obtaining Freddie Mac’s written approval, a Transfer of Servicing can result from
elements.label: text

elements.text: either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A negotiation between the Transferor Servicer and the Transferee Servicer; or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Certain changes in ownership of a Seller/Servicer that result in a conveyance or other
elements.label: text

elements.text: transfer, in effect, of the Servicing Contract Rights. The Seller/Servicer is responsible for:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Determining when a Transfer of Servicing will occur due to an organizational change
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Submitting the appropriate request specified in this section
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Complying with other requirements in the Guide, as applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 8105.1(b) regarding Servicing compensation to a new Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: pursuant to a Transfer of Servicing initiated by Freddie Mac. See Section 1402.5(e) for
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer of Servicing requirements involving eMortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferors and Transferees should review and consider adopting the Servicing Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: Management Checklist that includes links to the MISMO® Servicing Transfer Catalog,
elements.label: text

elements.text: which includes industry standard best practices, checklists and templates for Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer instructions, portfolio characteristics (i.e., product, programs, loan types and other
elements.label: text

elements.text: characteristics applicable to the transfer), image transfer schedules, required reporting,
elements.label: text

elements.text: reconciliation and more.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Submitting requests for Transfers of Servicing and Intra-Servicer Portfolio Moves
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer must obtain Freddie Mac’s written approval
elements.label: text

elements.text: of each Transfer of Servicing request before the transfer takes place. In the event the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer is going to establish a subservicing arrangement with a new Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agent, the Transferee Servicer and its proposed Servicing Agent must comply with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: general Freddie Mac Servicing requirements of Chapter 8101, including submitting a
elements.label: text

elements.text: complete and fully executed Form 479A, Single-Family Servicing Agent Certification and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s prior written approval is required, regardless of whether the Transfer of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing is initiated or requested by a Servicer or any other party, such as a conservator,
elements.label: text

elements.text: receiver or liquidator of the Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: On or before the Effective Date of Transfer, the Transferor Servicer must provide to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer copies of:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ All of the Transferor Servicer’s Purchase Documents applicable to the Transfer of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing (excluding any Credit Fees in Yield and other Credit Fees); and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ All of the Purchase Documents of any preceding Transferor Servicer that are applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: to the Transfer of Servicing (excluding any Credit Fees in Yield and other Credit Fees)
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Transfers of Servicing with an Effective Date of Transfer prior to April 11, 2018,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicers must provide such Purchase Documents to a Transferee Servicer upon
elements.label: text

elements.text: such Servicer’s written request.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Concurrent Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Before entering into one or more Concurrent Transfer(s) of Servicing with a specific
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer, the Seller as Transferor Servicer must obtain Freddie Mac’s written
elements.label: text

elements.text: approval to engage in such Transfer(s) of Servicing before entering into Pricing Identifier
elements.label: text

elements.text: Terms or other Purchase Documents to sell the Mortgages to Freddie Mac and designate
elements.label: text

elements.text: that particular Transferee Servicer as the Servicer of the Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will monitor the financial condition and performance of the Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer (Seller) and the Transferee Servicer and may, in its discretion, rescind or
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspend approval of the Concurrent Transfer of Servicing.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Prior to Effective Date of Transfer for any Concurrent Transfer of Servicing, the Seller as
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer must provide to the Transferee Servicer any and all data related to
elements.label: text

elements.text: each Mortgage. Specifically, the Seller as Transferor Servicer must inform the Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer with respect to each Mortgage related to the Transfer of Servicing, specifying by
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac loan number whether the Mortgage:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Has lender-purchased mortgage insurance and the terms of such insurance
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Is subject to a credit enhancement and the type of such enhancement, if any
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Has any of the following characteristics, in which case the Seller as Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must provide the data related to such characteristic:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Mortgage was originated pursuant to an affordable housing initiative
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Mortgage is secured by a Manufactured Home
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Transfer of Servicing is restricted under a negotiated term of business
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Mortgage is a Payoff Draft Date 18 Mortgage as defined in Section 8303.1
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Has a Note that is an eNote and/or or has an eModification Agreement and, in this
elements.label: text

elements.text: case, names the repository holding such eNote and eModification Agreement as
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Has other unique Servicing requirements, if applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will provide to both the Seller as Transferor Servicer a funding detail report,
elements.label: text

elements.text: which it may share with the Transferee Servicer to aid the Transferee Servicing in its
elements.label: text

elements.text: preparation of Servicing and accounting reports.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Concurrent Transfer of Servicing without bifurcation
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer are required to complete Form 960,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement for Concurrent Transfer of Servicing of Single-Family Mortgages. A
elements.label: text

elements.text: separate Form 960 is required for each Transferee Servicer. The fully executed Form
elements.label: text

elements.text: 960 must be submitted to Freddie Mac (see Directory 3).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will indicate its approval, if appropriate, by executing and returning a
elements.label: text

elements.text: copy of Form 960 to the Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer. The approval
elements.label: text

elements.text: becomes effective for Mortgages delivered by Transferor Servicer as a Seller on or
elements.label: text

elements.text: after the date Freddie Mac executes Form 960. The Form 960 remains valid until the
elements.label: text

elements.text: expiration date the Transferor Servicer enters on Form 960. If no expiration date is
elements.label: text

elements.text: provided, the Form 960 will remain in effect until terminated by Freddie Mac, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer or the Transferee Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: To terminate the Form 960, the Transferor Servicer or Transferee Servicer must first
elements.label: text

elements.text: notify the other party and then provide written notice to Freddie Mac (see Directory
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3) at least five Business Days prior to the requested termination date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Transferor Servicer submits multiple Concurrent Transfer of Servicing requests,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s approval does not constitute approval to exceed the amount of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer’s applicable Commitment Amount.
elements.label: text

elements.text: For a given Purchase Contract in Loan Selling Advisor®, the Seller/Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer may designate only one Transferee Servicer and its applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer number and must select the execution path “CTOS” on the “Take Out
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contract” screen in Loan Selling Advisor.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer each agree that, by their respective
elements.label: text

elements.text: execution of, and agreement to, the terms of Form 960, Seller’s subsequent sale of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages pursuant to the execution path “CTOS” in Loan Selling Advisor and its
elements.label: text

elements.text: selection of the applicable Seller/Servicer number of the Transferee Servicer binds
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer to the terms of fully executed and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac-approved Form 960 for such Mortgages. Transferee Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide its applicable Seller/Servicer number to the Seller for loans to be sold under
elements.label: text

elements.text: this program, as outlined in their bilateral Servicing Transfer Agreement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Concurrent Transfers of Servicing with complete/full bifurcation – Cash￾Released XChange®
elements.label: text

elements.text: The requirements for a Concurrent Transfer of Servicing of Mortgages sold to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac through Cash-Released XChange are contained in Exhibit 28A, Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Purchase and Sale Agreement for Cash-Released XChange®. By executing
elements.label: text

elements.text: and agreeing to the terms of Exhibit 28A, both Seller/Transferor Servicer and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer are bound by its terms for such Mortgages. Additionally, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Transferor Servicer must select the “Servicing Released” execution path on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: “Take Out Contract” screen in Loan Selling Advisor. The Transferee Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide its applicable Seller/Servicer number for loans sold under this program in its
elements.label: text

elements.text: bilateral Servicing Transfer Agreement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (C)Concurrent Transfers of Servicing with complete/full bifurcation – Co-Issue
elements.label: text

elements.text: XChange®
elements.label: text

elements.text: The requirements for a Concurrent Transfer of Servicing of Mortgages sold to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac through Co-Issue XChange are contained in Exhibit 26, Agreement for
elements.label: text

elements.text: Concurrent Transfer of Single-Family Mortgage Servicing Contract Rights With
elements.label: text

elements.text: Complete/Full Bifurcation.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Transferor Servicer agrees, by its selection of the execution path “CTOS” on
elements.label: text

elements.text: the “Take Out Contract” screen in Loan Selling Advisor and selection of the Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac-approved Transferee Servicer and its applicable Seller/Servicer number in Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: Selling Advisor, that it is bound by the terms of Exhibit 26 for the Mortgages sold by
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller via the Co-Issue XChange execution path in Loan Selling Advisor.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicers must enter into a separate agreement with Freddie Mac and
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide their applicable Seller/Servicer number to both Freddie Mac and Sellers with
elements.label: text

elements.text: whom they have entered into Exhibit 26. Transferee Servicer agrees that when a
elements.label: text

elements.text: particular Seller sells Mortgages via the “CTOS” execution path on the “Take Out
elements.label: text

elements.text: Contract” screen in Loan Selling Advisor and selects Transferee Servicer and its
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable Seller/Servicer number in Loan Selling Advisor as the Servicer, Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer is bound by the terms of Exhibit 26 for such Mortgages. Transferee Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must provide to Seller the Transferee Servicer’s applicable Seller/Servicer number for
elements.label: text

elements.text: loans to be sold under this program in their bilateral Servicing Transfer Agreement. A
elements.label: text

elements.text: model template of such an agreement is available as Exhibit 27, Loan Sale and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Transfer Agreement for Co-Issue XChange® with Complete/Full
elements.label: text

elements.text: Bifurcation.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Subsequent Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Process
elements.label: text

elements.text: At least 45 days but not more than 60 days before the requested Effective Date of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer for a Subsequent Transfer of Servicing, the Transferor Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Access the Servicing Transfer Manager tool available via Freddie Mac Gateway®
elements.label: text

elements.text: (see Exhibit 88, Servicing Tools)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Under the “Manage Portfolio” tab, select “Create a new STOS” request
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Complete all required fields and respond to the questions designated for the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer, including selecting the Transferee Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Submit the list of the Mortgages that are related to the Transfer of Servicing (the
elements.label: text

elements.text: “Proposed Mortgage List”) through Servicing Transfer Manager
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will notify the prospective Transferee Servicer of the requested Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: of Servicing by e-mail using the e-mail address supplied by the Transferor Servicer in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Transfer Manager. The Transferee Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Log into Servicing Transfer Manager, go to the “Manage Portfolio” tab and select
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transfer of Servicing transaction that was proposed by the Transferor Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Complete all fields designated to be completed by the Transferee Servicer for the
elements.label: text

elements.text: proposed Transfer of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will provide both the Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer with
elements.label: text

elements.text: additional data related to the Proposed Mortgage List and populate the responses to
elements.label: text

elements.text: certain questions based on data in Freddie Mac systems that was previously supplied
elements.label: text

elements.text: to Freddie Mac (e.g., by the Seller, prior Servicer or the Transferor Servicer). The
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer must validate the accuracy and completeness of all data, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: responses to all the questions and the content of the Proposed Mortgage List.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Once both the Transferor Servicer and the Transferee Servicer have completed all
elements.label: text

elements.text: fields and the Proposed Mortgage List is submitted, Servicing Transfer Manager will
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide the Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer the opportunity to review an
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Agreement for Subsequent Transfer of Servicing of Single-Family
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages (“STOS Agreement”), which must be electronically signed by both
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers, at least 45 days but not more than 60 days before the requested Effective
elements.label: text

elements.text: Date of Transfer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer will have the capability to add or remove Mortgages from the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Proposed Mortgage List and revalidate the responses to the various questions to
elements.label: text

elements.text: ensure they remain accurate in light of the added or removed Mortgages up to eight
elements.label: text

elements.text: days prior to the Effective Date of Transfer. In addition, Freddie Mac may require the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer to make changes to the Proposed Mortgage List. The Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer and Transferee Servicer must agree on the final list of Mortgages related to
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transfer of Servicing prior to the Effective Date of Transfer (“Final Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: List”) and, in the event there were changes to the Proposed Mortgage List, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers must electronically execute a new STOS Agreement related to the Final
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage List no later than eight days prior to the Effective Date of Transfer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If there are no changes to the Proposed Mortgage List, then such list is the Final
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage List, and the Servicers are not required to electronically execute a new
elements.label: text

elements.text: STOS Agreement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicing Contract Rights related to any Mortgage with any of the following
elements.label: text

elements.text: characteristics as of the day prior to the Effective Date of Transfer are not subject to
elements.label: text

elements.text: any Transfer of Servicing, notwithstanding the inclusion of such Mortgage’s loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: number on the Final Mortgage List:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any Mortgage that has been paid off
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any Mortgage that is a guaranteed or insured by the FHA or VA and has a
elements.label: text

elements.text: scheduled foreclosure sale date
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any Mortgage that is 90 days or more delinquent; or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any Mortgage that has been previously modified
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers that wish to transfer the Servicing Contract Rights related to Mortgages that
elements.label: text

elements.text: are delinquent for 90 days or more or have been previously modified must do so in
elements.label: text

elements.text: accordance with the Voluntary Partial Cancellation process outlined in Chapter 7102.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Refer to Section 1101.3 for information about costs and claims that may become due
elements.label: text

elements.text: and payable automatically upon the execution and submission of one or more STOS
elements.label: text

elements.text: requests, as defined in the Glossary definition of “Claims Event,” or the execution
elements.label: text

elements.text: and submission of one or more STOS Agreements, Voluntary Partial Cancellation
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreements, or Voluntary Full Cancellation Agreements that contemplate a Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: of Servicing that will result in the transfer of all or, in Freddie Mac’s sole
elements.label: text

elements.text: determination, substantially all of the Servicing Contract Rights of the Seller/Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: or Seller/Servicer’s Freddie Mac Servicing portfolio, either in a single transaction or a
elements.label: text

elements.text: series of transactions over a 180-day period. If triggered, the Transferor Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: pay the outstanding costs and FRE Claims as a condition of Freddie Mac’s approval
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the Transfer of Servicing or obtain a written waiver of such condition from Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Approval and execution
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon Freddie Mac’s approval of the Transfer of Servicing, Freddie Mac will notify
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer of Freddie Mac’s approval in writing,
elements.label: text

elements.text: and the Servicing Transfer Manager status for the proposed Transfer of Servicing will
elements.label: text

elements.text: change to an “approved” status. Freddie Mac reserves the right to withdraw its
elements.label: text

elements.text: approval of the Transfer of Servicing at any time prior to the Effective Date of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer in the event the Servicer makes any changes to the Proposed Mortgage List,
elements.label: text

elements.text: other than removal of Mortgages, or there is an intervening event that impacts the
elements.label: text

elements.text: continuing eligibility of either Servicer to engage in the Transfer of Servicing (e.g.,
elements.label: text

elements.text: bankruptcy, regulatory prohibition). Provided Freddie Mac does not withdraw its
elements.label: text

elements.text: approval on or before the Effective Date of Transfer, Freddie Mac will electronically
elements.label: text

elements.text: sign the STOS Agreement acknowledging its earlier approval for the Servicers to
elements.label: text

elements.text: proceed with the Transfer of Servicing on the Effective Date of Transfer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Effective Date of Transfer must be the first day of the month.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Prior to its Electronic execution of the STOS Agreement, the Transferor Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must provide to the Transferee Servicer any and all data related to each Mortgage set
elements.label: text

elements.text: forth in the Final Mortgage List, including the underlying data related to each such
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage for those questions that the Transferor Servicer answered and/or validated
elements.label: text

elements.text: “yes” as the appropriate response in Servicing Transfer Manager. Specifically, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer must inform the Transferee Servicer of each REO related to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer of Servicing and, with respect to each Mortgage related to the Transfer of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing, specify by Freddie Mac loan number whether the Mortgage:
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1. Has lender-purchased mortgage insurance and the terms of such insurance
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2. Is subject to a credit enhancement and the type of such enhancement, if any
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3. Is subject to a Trial Period Plan or mortgage modification and type of program for
elements.label: text

elements.text: each (e.g., Home Affordable Modification ProgramSM, Freddie Mac Standard
elements.label: text

elements.text: Modification, Freddie Mac Streamlined Modification, Freddie Mac Flex
elements.label: text

elements.text: Modification®)
elements.label: text

elements.text: 4. Is subject to a Payment Deferral
elements.label: text

elements.text: 5. Is or may become a Senior Subordinate Mortgage and in this instance, advise the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer of the Servicing requirements set forth in Chapter 8601
elements.label: text

elements.text: 6. Has any of the following characteristics and provide the data related to such
elements.label: text

elements.text: characteristic:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Step-rate
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Actual/actual remitting obligation
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Partial principal forbearance
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Originated pursuant to an affordable housing initiative
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Secured by a Manufactured Home
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transfer of Servicing is restricted under a negotiated term of business
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Payment cap or option ARMs, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Biweekly payments
elements.label: text

elements.text: 7. Has a specific remittance option, and the type of remittance option (e.g., a Payoff
elements.label: text

elements.text: Draft Date 18 Mortgage as defined in Section 8303.1)
elements.label: text

elements.text: 8. Has a repurchase or remedy demand in any status; and/or
elements.label: text

elements.text: 9. Has a note that is an eNote, has an eModification Agreement or Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Payment Deferral Agreement and, in this case, names the repository holding such
elements.label: text

elements.text: eNote, eModification Agreement or Electronic Payment Deferral Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: Prior to electronically executing the STOS Agreement, the Transferee Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: conduct due diligence on each Mortgage related to the Transfer of Servicing to ensure
elements.label: text

elements.text: that it has received all relevant data pertaining to each Mortgage and, based on that
elements.label: text

elements.text: information, determine that it has the operational capacity and capability to service
elements.label: text

elements.text: each such Mortgage.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Transfer of Servicing constitutes a Claims Event, then pursuant to Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1101.3, all FRE Claims related to the Transferor Servicer shall be deemed
elements.label: text

elements.text: immediately and automatically due and payable, without the need for further action
elements.label: text

elements.text: by Freddie Mac or any other party. If FRE Claims have become due and payable in
elements.label: text

elements.text: connection with the foregoing, the Transferor Servicer must pay, unconditionally and
elements.label: text

elements.text: in full, any and all FRE Claims as a condition to receipt of Freddie Mac’s approval of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transfer of Servicing; however, Freddie Mac may at any time expressly waive or
elements.label: text

elements.text: defer such payment obligation in writing in its sole and absolute discretion.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (C)Electronic Signature process
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers engaging in a Subsequent Transfer of Servicing must comply with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Transfer Manager Electronic Signature process.
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Servicer’s completion of all required fields, validation of the answers to all
elements.label: text

elements.text: questions set forth in Servicing Transfer Manager related to the Final Mortgage List,
elements.label: text

elements.text: and electronic execution and submission of the STOS Agreement in accordance with
elements.label: text

elements.text: this chapter and any additional requirements set forth in Servicing Transfer Manager
elements.label: text

elements.text: or the Servicing Transfer Manager User Guide is an Eligible Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transaction as defined. In addition, the fully executed STOS Agreement is a Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Document. Each Servicer engaging in a Subsequent Transfer of Servicing must
elements.label: text

elements.text: electronically sign the STOS Agreement and submit it to Freddie Mac via Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer Manager as an Electronic Record with its respective duly authorized
elements.label: text

elements.text: employees’ Electronic Signatures attached to or logically associated with such
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Record.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will acknowledge its approval, if granted, by electronically signing the
elements.label: text

elements.text: STOS Agreement in Servicing Transfer Manager and will notify both the Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer and the Transferee Servicer of such approval and the availability of the fully
elements.label: text

elements.text: executed STOS Agreement in Servicing Transfer Manager. The Transferor Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: and the Transferee Servicer each must download and retain the fully executed STOS
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement and Final Mortgage List in their respective Servicing systems.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Signature process defined terms
elements.label: text

elements.text: E
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Relating to technology having electrical, digital,
elements.label: text

elements.text: magnetic, wireless, optical, electromagnetic, or similar
elements.label: text

elements.text: capabilities, as defined in the “UETA” and/or “E-SIGN”
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Record A “Record” created, generated, sent, communicated,
elements.label: text

elements.text: received, or stored by “Electronic” means, as defined in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the “UETA” and/or “E-SIGN.” The term also includes a
elements.label: text

elements.text: paper document converted into an Electronic Record.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Signature An “Electronic” sound, symbol or process attached to, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: logically associated with, a contract or other “Record”
elements.label: text

elements.text: and executed or adopted by a person with the intent to
elements.label: text

elements.text: sign the “Record,” as defined in the “UETA” and/or “E￾SIGN”
elements.label: text

elements.text: eNote An Electronic Record that would be a promissory note if
elements.label: text

elements.text: it was issued in paper, and that the Borrower has agreed
elements.label: text

elements.text: to issue it as a Transferable Record.
elements.label: text

elements.text: eModification
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: An agreement that is an Electronic Record that complies
elements.label: text

elements.text: with the applicable modification requirements of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Guide and includes, with respect to paper Notes,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic modification agreements and Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Signature process defined terms
elements.label: text

elements.text: E
elements.label: text

elements.text: assumption and release of liability agreements
elements.label: text

elements.text: under Chapters 9206 and 8406, respectively.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Payment
elements.label: text

elements.text: Deferral Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: An agreement that is an Electronic Record that complies
elements.label: text

elements.text: with the applicable Payment Deferral requirements of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Guide, as set forth in and subject to Chapter 9203.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Eligible Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transaction
elements.label: text

elements.text: An “Electronic Transaction” that Freddie Mac has
elements.label: text

elements.text: required or permitted the Seller/Servicer to engage in
elements.label: text

elements.text: and/or conduct, as specified in Chapter 1401, other
elements.label: text

elements.text: chapters of the Guide or the Seller/Servicer’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: other Purchase Documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii) Denied Transfer of Servicing requests
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac reserves the right to deny a Transfer of Servicing request. Freddie Mac may
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide the Transferor Servicer written notice of the denial but is not obligated to provide
elements.label: text

elements.text: a written notice explaining the reason for denial.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iv) Freddie Mac’s rights
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Unauthorized Servicing Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: An Unauthorized Servicing Transfer constitutes grounds for suspension or
elements.label: text

elements.text: disqualification of both the purported Transferor Servicer and purported Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer as Seller/Servicers. Any Unauthorized Servicing Transfer constitutes a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Claims Event under Section 1101.3, pursuant to which all FRE Claims shall be
elements.label: text

elements.text: deemed immediately due and payable. In addition to its rights at law and equity,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may exercise any of its other rights under the Purchase Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: An Unauthorized Servicing Transfer (including an Unauthorized Transaction as
elements.label: text

elements.text: defined in Section 2101.12) will result in the assessment of a compensatory fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: determined by Freddie Mac not to exceed 1% of Freddie Mac’s share of the UPB of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgages that were related to the Unauthorized Servicing Transfer. The
elements.label: text

elements.text: imposition of this compensatory fee does not limit Freddie Mac’s rights to exercise
elements.label: text

elements.text: any of its other rights under the Purchase Documents including, without limitation,
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspension or disqualification of both the unauthorized Transferor Servicer and
elements.label: text

elements.text: purported Transferee Servicer as Seller/Servicers, as well as causing all FRE
elements.label: text

elements.text: Claims to be deemed immediately due and payable pursuant to Section 1101.3. If
elements.label: text

elements.text: an Unauthorized Servicing Transfer occurs, the unauthorized Transferor Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: and purported Transferee Servicer are jointly and severally liable to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: with respect to any losses, costs and damages (including, but not limited to, attorney
elements.label: text

elements.text: fees and related court and legal costs) incurred by Freddie Mac arising out of or
elements.label: text

elements.text: related to the Unauthorized Servicing Transfer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Post-transfer reviews
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may perform a post-transfer review of any approved Transfer of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing, which may include onsite visits, to determine whether the Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer and Transferee Servicer complied with the requirements of the Guide and
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable Purchase Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may also request the Servicer to perform a post-transfer review and
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide documentation of such review.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (v) Intra-Servicer Portfolio Move Request for Servicing of Single-Family Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Certain Servicers have been allocated two or more Seller/Servicer numbers with respect to
elements.label: text

elements.text: specific Mortgages that they service for Freddie Mac. If a Servicer wishes to consolidate
elements.label: text

elements.text: or reallocate the loan numbers attributable to one of its Seller/Servicer numbers to another
elements.label: text

elements.text: of its Seller/Servicer numbers (the “New Seller/Servicer Number”) (an “Intra-Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: Portfolio Move”), the Servicer must submit an Intra-Servicer Portfolio Move Request for
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing of Single-Family Mortgages and a list of such Mortgages via Servicing Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: Manager and obtain Freddie Mac’s prior approval by undertaking the following steps:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ At least 30 days, but not more than 60 days, prior to the requested effective date of
elements.label: text

elements.text: change, the Servicer must log into Servicing Transfer Manager, go to the “Manage
elements.label: text

elements.text: Portfolio” tab, select “Create New Request” and then and select “Intra-Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: Portfolio Move Request”
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Complete all questions designated to be completed by the Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Submit the list of Mortgages related to the change in Seller/Servicer number
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Sign the Intra-Servicer Portfolio Move Request to acknowledge the terms and
elements.label: text

elements.text: conditions associated with the change in Seller/Servicer number
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon receipt of the Intra-Servicer Portfolio Move Request and the list of related
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages, Freddie Mac will review the list to ensure that the Servicing of such
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages may be reallocated to the New Seller/Servicer Number. Upon Freddie Mac’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: approval, the Seller/Servicer number associated with the Mortgages will change in Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac’s systems as of the requested effective date of change, and the Servicer must make
elements.label: text

elements.text: corresponding changes in its systems as of the same date. An approved Intra-Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: Portfolio Move does not result in any change to the rights, liabilities and obligations the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer owes towards Freddie Mac under the Purchase Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Once the Servicer receives Freddie Mac’s approval, the Servicer must inform its Document
elements.label: text

elements.text: Custodian of the new Seller/Servicer Number.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers must also ensure that Principal and Interest Payments and Escrow Funds received
elements.label: text

elements.text: from Mortgages included in the Intra-Servicer Portfolio Move Request are deposited in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Custodial Account associated with the New Seller/Servicer Number. See Section 8302.1(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: for more information.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 7101.2: Reviews by Freddie Mac, Transferor Servicer
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: and Transferee Servicer, additional conditions of
elements.label: text

elements.text: approval (12/17/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac review
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transferor Servicer review
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transferee Servicer review
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Additional conditions of approval for Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Freddie Mac review
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will work with the Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer to approve a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer of Servicing but reserves the right to approve with conditions. Freddie Mac is not
elements.label: text

elements.text: obligated to approve a Transfer of Servicing. Freddie Mac will not approve a proposed
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer of Servicing if Freddie Mac, in the exercise of its judgment and in its sole
elements.label: text

elements.text: discretion, determines that such a transfer is not in the best interests of Freddie Mac or:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferor Servicer or Transferee Servicer will not be able to adequately service the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages and/or REO or meet the obligations under their respective Servicing Contracts
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Final Mortgage List includes Mortgages that are 90 days or more delinquent or have
elements.label: text

elements.text: been previously modified. Servicers who wish to transfer the Servicing Contract Rights
elements.label: text

elements.text: related to Mortgages that are delinquent for 90 days or more or have been previously
elements.label: text

elements.text: modified must do so in accordance with the Voluntary Partial Cancellation process
elements.label: text

elements.text: outlined in Chapter 7102
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer must be approved Seller/Servicers and must
elements.label: text

elements.text: be in compliance with all the requirements of the Purchase Documents. When reviewing a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer of Servicing request, Freddie Mac will review both the Transferor Servicer and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer. Transferor Servicers and Transferee Servicers must not be subject to any
elements.label: text

elements.text: situations prohibited under disqualification or suspension of the Seller or the Servicer in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 2301.1(b) unless approved by Freddie Mac. The review will focus on, but not be
elements.label: text

elements.text: limited to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Financial capacity to honor contractual obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Existence of any outstanding obligations (such as repurchases)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delinquency and REO ratios
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delinquency reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferee Servicer’s and Transferor Servicer’s performance results on their
elements.label: text

elements.text: respective Servicer Success Scorecards
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s review of the Transfer of Servicing request may take additional time if either
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transferor Servicer or Transferee Servicer is subject to any situations prohibited under
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 2301.1(b) or the Purchase Documents reflect negotiated terms, including the sale of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages to Freddie Mac with recourse.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Transferor Servicer review
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer must participate with the Transferee Servicer with respect to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer’s due diligence review on the Mortgages related to the Transfer of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing, Custodial Accounts, obligations under the Purchase Documents and any
elements.label: text

elements.text: alternative to foreclosure and provide to the Transferee Servicer any missing data,
elements.label: text

elements.text: documents or other information necessary for the Transferee Servicer to perform its
elements.label: text

elements.text: obligations under the Guide and applicable Purchase Documents and in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: terms of the Mortgage and applicable alternatives to foreclosure.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon request, the Transferor Servicer must provide the post-transfer review results to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Transferee Servicer review
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferee Servicer must perform a due diligence review on the Mortgages related to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer of Servicing and on Custodial Accounts and must be aware of any obligations of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer under the Purchase Documents that the Transferee is assuming (e.g.,
elements.label: text

elements.text: payoff remittance requirements) and any alternative to foreclosure, whether offered and
elements.label: text

elements.text: outstanding or currently in place with a Borrower. The Transferee Servicer’s due diligence
elements.label: text

elements.text: efforts should include, but are not limited to, a review of the following information that the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer may provide:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reports and data that confirm and support information provided by the Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Pertinent reports prepared by internal or external auditors, including any recently
elements.label: text

elements.text: completed Freddie Mac audit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon request, the Transferee Servicer must provide the post-transfer review results to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer may not provide a copy of its Servicer Success Scorecard to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer without Freddie Mac’s prior written approval.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Additional conditions of approval for Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer and Transferee Servicer each represent and warrant to Freddie Mac that
elements.label: text

elements.text: it has met the requirements in this section for Mortgages related to a Transfer of Servicing,
elements.label: text

elements.text: and each agrees and acknowledges that Freddie Mac’s approval of a Transfer of Servicing is
elements.label: text

elements.text: conditioned upon such representations and warranties.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Mortgage insurance coverage
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transfer of Servicing must comply with the requirements of each MI that insures any
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the Mortgages. Before the Effective Date of Transfer, the Transferor Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: obtain a commitment from each MI to continue to provide coverage required by Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac for the benefit of the Transferee Servicer. If an MI will not continue such coverage,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transferor Servicer must obtain a written commitment by another MI to provide
elements.label: text

elements.text: equivalent coverage.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Special requirements for Mortgages related to a Transfer of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: No Mortgage subject to the Transfer of Servicing may be subject to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A prohibition on its Transfer of Servicing in the Purchase Documents (for instance, in
elements.label: text

elements.text: a term of business) or as a condition of purchase or otherwise
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ An outstanding requirement to be met by the Transferor Servicer prior to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Effective Date of Transfer, such as, for instance:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ GreenCHOICE Mortgages® with eligible improvements as described in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 4606.1(b) that are not complete. (See Section 4606.5 for Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: involving GreenCHOICE Mortgages.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ For Subsequent Transfers of Servicing, CHOICERenovation® Mortgages with
elements.label: text

elements.text: eligible renovations as described in Section 4607.6 that are not complete. (See
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 4607.17 for Transfers of Servicing involving CHOICERenovation
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ For Concurrent Transfers of Servicing, CHOICERenovation Mortgages delivered
elements.label: text

elements.text: pursuant to Section 4607.1(b) where Freddie Mac’s prior written approval has not
elements.label: text

elements.text: been obtained pursuant to Section 4607.17
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ For Concurrent Transfers of Servicing, CHOICEReno eXPress® Mortgages with
elements.label: text

elements.text: renovations that are not complete
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additional requirements apply to certain Mortgages and Mortgage types.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ To include the Servicing Contract Rights related to a Mortgage represented by an
elements.label: text

elements.text: LNA in a Transfer of Servicing, the Transferor Servicer must obtain Freddie Mac’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: prior approval using the procedure for Servicer responsibilities related to document
elements.label: text

elements.text: custody set forth in Section 8107.1 and must identify each such Mortgage to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer and Transferee Servicer’s Document Custodian
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ eMortgages (as defined in Section 1402.1(b)) must at all times be serviced by an
elements.label: text

elements.text: approved Servicer of eMortgages for Freddie Mac or its Servicing Agent pursuant to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1402.5(a)(i)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii) Additional delivery data for Concurrent Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Concurrent Transfers of Servicing, additional Mortgage delivery data required by
elements.label: text

elements.text: Form 960, Agreement for Concurrent Transfer of Servicing of Single-Family Mortgages,
elements.label: text

elements.text: and Chapter 7101 must be submitted by:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferor Servicer, if submitted at Mortgage delivery, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferee Servicer, if submitted after Mortgage delivery
elements.label: text

elements.text: For the Transferee Servicer to submit the data after Mortgage delivery, the Transferor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must obtain Freddie Mac's prior written approval and provide to the Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer copies of the Mortgage file documents required for accurate data delivery.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iv) Mortgages in a Trial Period
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer must notify the Transferee Servicer if there are any Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: related to a Transfer of Servicing subject to a Trial Period Plan and must confirm that the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer will assume the additional responsibilities associated with these
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Transfer of Servicing involves Mortgages in a Trial Period or already subject to a
elements.label: text

elements.text: modification, the Transferor Servicer must affirmatively indicate that in Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer Manager (see Exhibit 88, Servicing Tools) and identify for each Mortgage the
elements.label: text

elements.text: modification initiative on the Proposed Mortgage List and Final Mortgage List, as those
elements.label: text

elements.text: terms are identified in Section 7101.1(b)(ii) (e.g., Home Affordable Modification
elements.label: text

elements.text: ProgramSM (HAMP®), Freddie Mac Standard Modification, Freddie Mac Streamlined
elements.label: text

elements.text: Modification, Freddie Mac Flex Modification®).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (v) Modified Mortgages that have a step-rate provision or partial principal forbearance
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer must affirmatively indicate in Servicing Transfer Manager
elements.label: text

elements.text: whether any Mortgages related to a Transfer of Servicing are modified Mortgages that
elements.label: text

elements.text: have a step-rate provision (i.e., the interest rate is subject to incremental increases
elements.label: text

elements.text: beginning in year 6 of the modification) or a partial principal forbearance.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (vi) Mortgages modified electronically
elements.label: text

elements.text: If any Mortgage related to a Transfer of Servicing has been modified electronically, as
elements.label: text

elements.text: defined in Section 1401.3(h), the Transferor Servicer must affirmatively identify it in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Transfer Manager (see Exhibit 88). See Section 9205.3(c) for requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: governing the HAMP eModification Agreement.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (vii) Maintain financial eligibility requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: Prior to the Effective Date of Transfer, the Transferor Servicer must evaluate whether the
elements.label: text

elements.text: proposed Transfer of Servicing will in any way impair its ability to demonstrate to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s satisfaction that it has sufficient capitalization, profitability, liquidity and
elements.label: text

elements.text: funding sources to support its ongoing operations and its commitments to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: following the Transfer of Servicing. Transferee Servicer must conduct the same
elements.label: text

elements.text: evaluation of itself.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (viii) Mortgages subject to a Payment Deferral processed electronically
elements.label: text

elements.text: If any Mortgage related to a Transfer of Servicing is subject to a Payment Deferral
elements.label: text

elements.text: processed electronically, as defined in Section 1401.3(h), with an Electronic Payment
elements.label: text

elements.text: Deferral Agreement, the Transferor Servicer must affirmatively identify it in Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer Manager (see Exhibit 88).
elements.label: text

elements.text: 7101.3: Transfers of Servicing, reporting requirements
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: and Liabilities of the Transferor and Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers (09/10/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan-level reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Accounting reporting and drafting
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ General rules for allocation of liabilities between the Transferor Servicer and Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Special rules for allocation of liabilities
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Hold Freddie Mac harmless
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transferee Servicer Responsibilities to Servicing Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Loan-level reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer must report to Freddie Mac all loan-level transactions, including
elements.label: text

elements.text: payoffs and reporting revisions for the Accounting Cycle prior to the month in which the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Effective Date of Transfer occurs. (For example, for Transfers of Servicing effective
elements.label: text

elements.text: February 1st, the Transferor Servicer will submit all loan-level transactions before the close
elements.label: text

elements.text: of business on January 31st and clear outstanding edits no later than January 31st plus one
elements.label: text

elements.text: Business Day.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Beginning on the Effective Date of Transfer, the Transferee Servicer must submit all loan￾level reporting, whether required to be submitted electronically or by paper copy, in the name
elements.label: text

elements.text: and Seller/Servicer number of the Transferee Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Accounting reporting and drafting
elements.label: text

elements.text: All accounting reporting due to Freddie Mac must be submitted in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: reporting and drafting requirements in Section 8303.1(c).
elements.label: text

elements.text: All of the following must be reported by and will be drafted from the Transferor Servicer:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Payoffs for which the payoff date is before the Effective Date of Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Third-party foreclosure sales for which the sale date is before the Effective Date of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Forecasted scheduled interest reported in the month before the Effective Date of Transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: that is due to Freddie Mac in the month of the transfer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Principal reported in the Accounting Cycle immediately preceding the Effective Date of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfer (e.g., principal reported between the P&I Determination Date and the end of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:

elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Endorsement of Notes and assignment of Security Instruments for Mortgages related to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfers of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Notes for Mortgages sold to Freddie Mac are endorsed in blank in accordance with
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 6301.2(a). When a Transfer of Servicing occurs, the Transferor Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: prepare and complete assignments of the Security Instrument described below but may not
elements.label: text

elements.text: complete the blank endorsement on the Note or further endorse it. LNAs are not “live” Notes
elements.label: text

elements.text: and cannot be endorsed under any circumstance.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Concurrent Transfers of Servicing for Mortgages not registered with MERS®
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Concurrent Transfers of Servicing, for each Mortgage that is not registered with
elements.label: text

elements.text: MERS, the Transferor Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Record Intervening Assignments to complete the chain of assignments to it from the
elements.label: text

elements.text: original mortgagee, in accordance with Section 6301.2(d)(i)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assign the Security Instrument to the Transferee Servicer and record the assignment
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Follow the procedures set forth in Section 7101.4(c) and deliver the assignment to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer’s Document Custodian to be verified in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of Section 6304.2
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See Mortgages not registered with MERS in Section 6301.2(d)(i) for additional
elements.label: text

elements.text: information.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Concurrent or Subsequent Transfers of Servicing for Mortgages registered with
elements.label: text

elements.text: MERS
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Subsequent Transfers of Servicing, for each Mortgage that is registered with MERS:
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Transferee Servicer is a MERS Member, no further assignment is needed, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transferor Servicer must notify MERS of the Transfer of Servicing.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Transferee Servicer is not a MERS Member, then the Transferor Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: prepare and record an assignment of the Security Instrument (on behalf of MERS) from
elements.label: text

elements.text: MERS to the Transferee Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Transferor Servicer must follow the procedures set forth in Section 7101.4(c) and
elements.label: text

elements.text: deliver the assignment to the Transferee Servicer’s Document Custodian to be verified
elements.label: text

elements.text: and certified in accordance with the requirements of Section 6304.2.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See Mortgages registered with MERS in Section 6301.2(d)(ii) for additional
elements.label: text

elements.text: information.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii) Subsequent Transfers of Servicing for Mortgages not registered with MERS
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Subsequent Transfers of Servicing of Mortgages that are not registered with MERS,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transferor Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Recover and destroy any original unrecorded assignments to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assign the Security Instrument to the Transferee Servicer and record the assignment
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Follow the procedures set forth in Section 7101.4(c) and deliver assignment(s) to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Document Custodian to be verified in accordance with the delivery of
elements.label: text

elements.text: notes and assignments to a Document Custodian in Section 6304.2
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the most recent assignment of the Security Instrument is to Freddie Mac and that
elements.label: text

elements.text: assignment was recorded, the Transferor Servicer may not prepare an assignment to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Concurrent or Subsequent Transfers of Servicing for a Mortgage secured by a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Manufactured Home located in a certificate of title State
elements.label: text

elements.text: The requirements in this subsection apply to preparing and completing assignments of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: security interest in the Manufactured Home for Concurrent or Subsequent Transfers of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing when the Manufactured Home is located in a certificate of title State that does not
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide for surrender and cancelation of the certificate of title (see Section 5703.4(f)(iii)). In
elements.label: text

elements.text: a certificate of title State, a lien on the Manufactured Home is evidenced and perfected by
elements.label: text

elements.text: notation on the certificate of title to the Manufactured Home. The lien on the land on which
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Manufactured Home is permanently attached is perfected by recording the Security
elements.label: text

elements.text: Instrument.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Therefore, in addition to the procedures described in this Section for preparing and
elements.label: text

elements.text: completing assignments of the Security Instrument, the following procedures must be
elements.label: text

elements.text: followed with respect to the Manufactured Home:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the Borrower holds the original certificate of title to the Manufactured Home and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: original certificate of title must be produced to note the assignment, the Seller/Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must obtain the original certificate of title from the Borrower and follow the applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: procedure to note the assignment on the certificate of title
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferor Servicer must note any intervening assignments from the original
elements.label: text

elements.text: mortgagee to the Transferor Servicer on the certificate of title and, if required, record the
elements.label: text

elements.text: complete chain of assignments from the original mortgagee to the Transferor Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: with the State motor vehicles administration or other authorized agency
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferor Servicer must note the assignment of its interest in the Manufactured
elements.label: text

elements.text: Home to the Transferee Servicer on the certificate of title and, if required, record the
elements.label: text

elements.text: assignment with the State motor vehicles administration or other authorized agency
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the Borrower holds the original certificate of title, the Transferor Servicer must make
elements.label: text

elements.text: and retain a copy of the original certificate with the noted assignments before returning
elements.label: text

elements.text: the original certificate of title with the noted assignments to the Borrower in accordance
elements.label: text

elements.text: with applicable procedures
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferor Servicer must deliver the certificate of title (or if applicable a copy of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: certificate of title) evidencing the complete chain of title to the Transferee Servicer, who
elements.label: text

elements.text: must retain the certificate of title or a copy of the certificate of title, as applicable, in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage file
